title: UN Security Council to Convene on Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra Strike - Kyiv Post
summary_full: UN Security Council to Convene on Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra Strike  Kyiv PostRosemary DiCarlo, Under-Secretary-General for Political and Peacebuilding Affairs — Briefing to the UN Security Council on the Maintenance of Peace and Security of Ukraine (10166th Meeting)  The America TimesThe UN Security Council will hold an emergency meeting in response to Russia's attack on the Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra  UA.NEWSUN Security Council to meet on Ukraine’s request following Russian attacks  Caliber.AzUN Security Council to meet June 22 over Russia's latest major attack on Ukraine  Interfax-Ukraine
